characters.description: A formidable independent cultivator whose incomplete body cultivation is steadily destroying him. He and Falling Leaf search the wilderness for a manual that may complete his training and halt the fatal decline.
characters.name: Sen

characters.description: Sen's Ghost Panther companion, chosen family, and hunting partner. She can pass for human and fights powerful spirit beasts beside him. She recognizes that his incomplete cultivation is killing him but remains committed to staying with him.
characters.name: Falling Leaf

characters.description: One of Sen’s established teachers and protectors. Feng has repeatedly helped restrain Sen’s most dangerous training impulses.
characters.name: Feng

characters.description: A senior cultivator counted among Sen’s established teachers and protectors. Kho previously helped restrain Sen’s dangerous approach to training.
characters.name: Kho

characters.description: One of Sen's teachers and a trusted provider of alchemical aid. She previously helped restrain his dangerous approach to training, and her medicines remain among the limited resources available to him and Falling Leaf during their search.
characters.name: Caihong

characters.description: The elusive cultivator Sen has been seeking and the holder of the Five-Fold Body Transformation Manual. Her apparent madness is a performance. After saving Sen, she offers access to the manual in return for five years in which he will serve her or submit to her observation.
characters.name: Nascent-soul alchemist

characters.description: A powerful cultivator whom Falling Leaf names as part of her chosen family.
characters.name: Feng Ming

characters.description: An evolved Ghost Panther who approaches Sen and Falling Leaf after secretly observing them. He claims authority as a surviving pride father and demands that Falling Leaf join a wider conflict involving their kind, placing lineage against the family she has chosen.
characters.name: Elder Ghost Panther

characters.description: A confident cultivator who reaches the defenses around Sen’s camp and shows interest in Sen and Falling Leaf. Sen drives him away but suspects that he remains nearby.
characters.name: Camp visitor

characters.description: The self-aware leader of a vast spider colony. She attacks Sen's fortified camp to avenge spiders he killed while rescuing the poisoned Falling Leaf, directing thousands of her offspring against his formations and making the conflict personally charged.
characters.name: Spider matriarch

characters.description: A self-aware young dragon and the strongest creature Sen has directly fought. It takes part in a coordinated spirit-beast assault against Sen and Falling Leaf. Sen kills it, but the battle leaves him severely wounded and almost without qi, while whoever organized the attack remains unknown.
characters.name: Dragon

characters.description: A powerful being from Sen's earlier travels whose unfinished business now requires another meeting. Once his health is restored, Sen decides to seek the turtle on his own schedule rather than risk it appearing at a more dangerous or disruptive time.
characters.name: Ancient divine turtle

characters.description: A royal cultivator and former associate whom Sen expects may confront him during his planned stop in the capital. He wants to avoid both her and a fight, yet regards the possibility as serious enough to admit that he may have to kill her if no alternative remains.
characters.name: Royal princess

characters.description: Sen's former companion and capital contact, whose protected house he visits quietly after a long absence.
characters.name: Former companion

characters.description: An independent artisan outside the capital who supplies formation flags without the institutional obligations Sen wants to avoid. He sells Sen a usable replacement set, accepts a commission for specialized flags, and sees an opportunity in Sen's alchemical skill.
characters.name: Formation-maker

characters.description: A protective former travelling companion of Sen and an ally in the capital. After the princess's failed assault, she confronts the royal cultivator, explains the mortal danger that forced Sen to leave, and insists that any future dealings with him must not endanger him.
characters.name: Feng's watcher

characters.description: A male Ghost Panther who has demanded that Falling Leaf accompany him. Falling Leaf personally refused, with Sen supporting her choice. Sen nevertheless expects the claimant to return, leaving another unresolved challenge to her autonomy.
characters.name: Ghost Panther claimant

characters.description: A capable stranger who bypasses Sen's camp formations and says an unnamed master sent him with a proposal. He appears close to Sen's cultivation level and presses for a hearing despite Sen's firm refusal to accept another unknown obligation.
characters.name: Messenger

characters.description: Three junior disciples who block Sen's path, demand recognition of their sect and honor, and prepare to attack him. Sen overwhelms them with Heaven's Shadow, an apparently nonlethal technique whose lasting effects are not yet known.
characters.name: Three junior disciples

characters.description: An inner disciple sent to locate three missing juniors. She believes the assignment may be retaliation from an elder whose advances she rejected. Finding the disciples alive but psychologically devastated, she puts their immediate survival ahead of reporting to her sect.
characters.name: Core-stage investigator

characters.description: A returning sea captain who recognizes Sen, cites an earlier debt, and agrees to carry him to the ancient divine turtle cove.
characters.name: Returning sea captain
